message:
chore: Add ephemeral E2E test artifacts to .gitignore

Ignore files that are regenerated during test runs:
- tmp/ - General temporary files
- tests/e2e-report/ - Playwright HTML report output
- tests/e2e-results.json - Playwright JSON results
- tests/e2e/.env.test - Contains PIDs and paths that change per run

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -51,3 +51,9 @@ test-results/*
 !test-results/no_mock_allowlist.json
 !test-results/no_mock_audit.md
 claude-upgrade-progress.json
+
+# Ephemeral E2E test artifacts
+tmp/
+tests/e2e-report/
+tests/e2e-results.json
+tests/e2e/.env.test
